title: Shri Skandamata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Skandamata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Skandamata.
description:
Jai teri ho Skand Mata,
Paanchva naam tumhara aata॥
Sabke man ki jaanan haari,
Jag janani sabki mahatari॥
॥ Jai teri ho Skand Mata ॥

Teri jot jalata rahu main,
Hardam tujhe dhyata rahu main॥
Kayi naamon se tujhe pukara,
Mujhe ek hai tera sahara॥
॥ Jai teri ho Skand Mata ॥

Kahi pahado par hai dera,
Kayi shahron mein tera basera॥
Har mandir mein tere nazare,
Gun gaaye tere bhakt pyare॥
॥ Jai teri ho Skand Mata ॥

Bhakti apni mujhe dila do,
Shakti meri bigadi bana do॥
Indra aadi devta mil saare,
Kare pukaar tumhare dware॥
॥ Jai teri ho Skand Mata ॥

Dusht daitya jab chadh kar aaye,
Tu hi khanda haath uthaye॥
Daason ko sada bachane aayi,
Bhakt ki aas pujane aayi॥
॥ Jai teri ho Skand Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Skandamata's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Skandamata is the mother of Lord Kartikeya (Skanda). Her Aarti brings salvation, ultimate peace, prosperity, and the blessings of maternal love to devotees.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The fifth day of Navratri (Panchami) is dedicated to Maa Skandamata and is considered the most auspicious for her worship and Aarti.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Skandamata during Aarti?
faq.a3: Maa Skandamata is very fond of bananas as an offering.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and purity in the home temple on the fifth day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Skandamatayai Namah' after the Aarti is considered very auspicious for mental peace and spiritual bliss.
